extension.news: [COLOR lavender][B]do-magic[/B][/COLOR] [B]1.1:[/B] - Add Streamtape download function [B]1.0:[/B] - Initial Public release - Add ability to enter the password and function.
extension.summary: Manage your Kodi install made easy!
extension.description:
Lets you manage your Kodi install with advanced application of functions.
Kodi Program Addon to allow users to modify your Kodi install by running advanced functions.
This is a restricted Program Addon that you must contact kodi@borsch.ca to get a password.
